name: Nikolas Maerker
tagline: I create websites, photo, and video content for service businesses, companies, and brands that want a stronger presence, more trust, and more qualified inbound leads.

hero.headline: Websites and content for service businesses, companies, and brands
hero.specialization: For service businesses, companies, and personal brands that want to communicate more clearly, look more credible, and convert attention into real inquiries.
specializationLines: Communicate more clearly, look more credible,

servicesHeading: Services built to move the brand forward.
servicesLead: I combine strategy, design, and execution so your presence does more than look polished. It should communicate clearly, build trust, and support conversions.

services.title: Web Design & Development
services.description: Websites and landing pages that make your offer easier to understand, feel more credible, and turn visits into inquiries.
bullets: Landing pages, websites, and custom builds

services.title: Photo & Video
services.description: Photo and video content that presents your brand at a higher level and gives you stronger assets for web, social, and campaigns.
bullets: A consistent visual language across channels

services.title: Drone Pilot / Aerial
services.description: Drone footage that adds perspective, energy, and production value to real estate, events, and branded content.
bullets: Real estate, events, and brand content
Smooth cinematic shots that integrate cleanly

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: I listen to your vision and define the roadmap for success.

steps.title: Strategy
steps.description: Researching the market to position you perfectly.

steps.title: Creation

steps.description: Deploying to the world with full support and optimization.

about.paragraph: I'm a focused creator: fast, conversion-oriented. I build websites and content that perform.
bullets: High-performance sites and landing pages (Astro, Cloudflare)
Event photography, drone shots, and video editing
Clear process and communication from brief to delivery

contact.headline: Let's build something memorable.
contact.subline: Reach out to discuss how I can help with your project.
